series_metadata.series_description: Records include inspection reports and any associated supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep all records two years aft administrative, civil or criminal action (case) is complete ; Electronic: Keep five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep all records two years aft administrative, civil or criminal action (case) is complete
